passives.desc:
For this Encounter, maintain Effloresced[TabExplain] E.G.O::Procuration state
- Encounter Start: Gain [UnlockBuff_1] and 3 [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy]
- Gain [Blandishment_Enemy] and a different set of Resistance values while in this state
- SP does not drop below 0
passives.name: Effloresced E.G.O::Procuration

passives.desc:
Encounter Start: Gain Shield equal to 20% of max HP (remains throughout this Encounter)

Turn Start:
- Gain [IndexPrescript_Base_2nd] based on [UnlockBuff_Base] stage on self
- Inflict [IndexPrescriptTargetToPersonality] to a random enemy and prioritize attacking that enemy (excluding certain pattern)

Deal +2.5% damage to [IndexPrescriptTargetToPersonality] for every [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy] (max 20%)
- At 9 [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy], deal +30% damage to all targets instead
passives.name: Will of the Prescript

passives.desc:
Turn End: If [IndexPrescript_Base_2nd] was executed this turn, heal 15 SP and gain [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy] by ([UnlockBuff_Base] stage + 1) (once per turn)

Turn End: If [IndexPrescript_Base_2nd] was not executed this turn, gain 1 [PressureOfPrescript] and 10 [KarmaOfIndexStudent]
- If this unit's [UnlockBuff_Base] stage is below 2, gain 1 [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy]
- At 9 [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy], does not gain [KarmaOfIndexStudent]

- Gain [EsteemNeeds] equal to [PressureOfPrescript] gained every time this unit gains [PressureOfPrescript]
passives.name: Undertake Prescript

passives.desc:
Turn End: At 6/9 [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy] or at 80%-/60%- HP,
- Gain [UnlockBuff_2]/[UnlockBuff_3]
- Heal to 45 SP
- Consume all [PressureOfPrescript] and recover from Stagger

If [UnlockBuff_Base] was gained based on HP conditional above,
- Gain [KarmaOfIndexStudent] by (sum of healed SP / 15)
- Increase [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy] to 6/9 if this unit had less than 6/9 [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy]; gain 1 [DefenseDown] and 2 [KarmaOfIndexStudent] next turn for every [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy] gained

Min & Max Speed +10 in the turn this unit uses its powerful attack
passives.name: Unlock

passives.desc:
At [UnlockBuff_3], apply the following effects:
- [Blandishment_Shin_Enemy], gain Shield equal to 50% of max HP (lasts for the rest of this Encounter)
- Intensify [PressureOfPrescript] to [PressureOfPrescript_2nd] and max out its Stack
- Turn Start: Gain 1 [PressureOfPrescript_2nd]
passives.name: Concentration

passives.desc: Turn End: if in Panic, reset SP to 0.
passives.name: Panic Recovery

passives.desc: This unit's Panic Type does not change when inflicted with an effect that changes Panic Types. Instead, this unit is inflicted with an effect that is inflicted against Non-SP Units.
passives.name: Fixed Panic

skills.desc:
Final Power +1 for every 6 ([Breath] on self + [Sinking] on target) (max 2)
[WhenUse] Gain +2 [Breath] Count
[EndSkill] Lose 3 SP
skills.name: Let These Hands be the Proxy...

skills.desc: Final Power +1 for every 6 ([Breath] on self + [Sinking] on target) (max 2) [StartBattle] If this unit has [PressureOfPrescript], or if target has [IndexPrescriptTargetToPersonality], convert the final Coin to [SuperCoin] [DefeatDuel] Deal -50% damage; On Hit, does not Stagger the target; On Hit, does not activate [Sinking] on target [WhenUse] Gain 2 [Breath] [EndSkill] Lose 3 SP
skills.name: Disembowel, Eviscerate...

skills.desc: Coin Power +1 for every 6 ([Breath] on self + [Sinking] on target) (max 2) [StartBattle] If this unit has [PressureOfPrescript], or if target has [IndexPrescriptTargetToPersonality], convert all Coins on this Skill to [SuperCoin]s [WhenUse]If the target has [IndexPrescriptTargetToPersonality], deal +50% damage [WhenUse] Gain 3 [Breath] and +3 [Breath] Count [DefeatDuel] Deal -80% damage; On Hit, does not Stagger the target; On Hit, does not activate [Sinking] on target [EndSkill] Lose 6 SP
skills.name: Procuration: Engrave

skills.desc: Can Clash with this Skill regardless of Speed [WhenUse] If the target has [IndexPrescriptTargetToPersonality], deal +100% damage [DefeatDuel] Gain 3 [ResultReduction] and 4 [Paralysis] [DefeatDuel] Deal -90% damage; On Hit, does not Stagger the target; On Hit, does not activate [Sinking] on target [EndSkill] Lose 15 SP [EndSkill] Consume all [PressureOfPrescript]
skills.name: Procuration: Annihilate

skills.desc: [WhenUse] At 0+ SP, generate 1 Mang - Deal +20% damage, Final Power +2, Coin Power +2 [EndSkill] Lose 15 SP [EndSkill] If this Skill generated 1 Mang, lose 20 SP [EndSkill] Consume all [PressureOfPrescript]
skills.name: Procuration: Annihilation - Mang of Immanent Yearning [本望]

skills.desc: Targets Ryōshū and cannot change target [WhenUse]Generate 1 Mang - Deal +20% damage, Final Power +2, Coin Power +2 [EndSkill] Lose 15 SP [EndSkill] If this Skill generated 1 Mang, lose 20 SP
skills.name: Hear all. Hope all. With these Hands, all will...

passives.desc: Attack Skill End: Deal (# of Slash Coins that hit Critically x 10) Slash damage against each target (cannot be Staggered due to this damage)
passives.name: Training to Inherit the Name of a Star

passives.desc:
If this unit has [DicipleLittleFinger], gain the following effects:
- SP does not drop below 0; if it was below 0, recover to 0
- Convert any SP damage taken into Gloom damage (save for SP changes due to "Base factors increasing/decreasing Sanity")
passives.name: Tranquility [靜念]

passives.desc:
In a Clash against targets that aren't Ryōshū, Clash Power -2
Take -20% damage from targets other than Ryōshū
passives.name: Grace

passives.desc: Turn End: if in Panic, reset SP to 0.
passives.name: Panic Recovery

passives.desc: This unit's Panic Type does not change when inflicted with an effect that changes Panic Types. Instead, this unit is inflicted with an effect that is inflicted against Non-SP Units.
passives.name: Fixed Panic

passives.desc:
This unit's [Breath] Potency is capped at 25
Any excess [Breath] Potency gained past 25 will be converted to [DicipleLittleFinger]

Gain [Fugacious] equal to [DicipleLittleFinger] lost every time this unit loses [DicipleLittleFinger] Stack
passives.name: Singular Focus of the Mind

[StartBattle] Gain +4 [Breath] Count
- If the Skill Slot using this Skill is a main target of an Attack Skill, gain 2 fewer [Breath] Count from this effect

[WinDuel] Gain +1 [Breath] Count
